examples.title: Fixed Size
examples.code:
<Stack Direction="Stack.StackDirection.Horizontal" Align="center">
    <Avatar />
    <Spacer Size="4" />
    <Stack Gap="0">
        <Text Weight="medium" Size="sm">Jane Doe</Text>
        <Text Color="muted" Size="xs">jane@example.com</Text>
    </Stack>
</Stack>
